request_text: Install bounded durable checkpoint/replay minimum artifacts with SEE/CE evidence, tests, receipt, handoff, and support proof bundle.
SEE_summary: Durable execution requires persisted per-step state; interrupts require checkpointers and JSON-serializable payloads; HITL resume needs serializable run state; replay should rely on event/checkpoint histories rather than chat claims.
CE_decision: Implement a minimal artifact-backed checkpoint/replay gate with thread_id, checkpoint_id, hash-chain parent binding, interrupt/resume schema, atomic writes, and fail-closed validation.
